TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Charles Bradley nalecuhan i Havre de Grace, Maryland, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Charles Bradley i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 23, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 5 bulad 16 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Charles Bradley, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs bradr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ƒßa*r…ô d…ô gra ¶…ô, marjr~…æand, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs bradr~…æ…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu boston ¶…ôr~…æti ¶s putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs bradr~…æ…ô, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Charles Bradley nalecuhan i Havre de Grace, Maryland, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Charles Bradley i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 23, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 5 bulad 16 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Charles Bradley, miunduay.
